Project axis:

Starting state (greenfield / existing work / existing work + existing conventions)
Complexity (single concern / multi-component / ambiguous scope)
Has a CLAUDE.md already or not

## Project Definition

### Project Type

- [ ] New project
- [ ] Existing project

### Complexity Level

- [ ] Simple (single concern, clear scope)
- [ ] Medium (moderate scope, multiple components)
- [ ] Complex (broad scope, multiple stakeholders, existing conventions)

### Project Details

**Name:** {project name}

**Description:** {One-line description of what the project does}

**Tools & environment:** {Primary tools, languages, frameworks, dependencies, or platforms}

**Initial State:**
- Files/directories to pre-create: {list}
- Existing `.claude/` directory: Yes/No
  - If yes, what's in it: {describe existing config}
